data.title: Generalize awaiting_* filter in sprint-next-batch.sh (flag-gated)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Modify plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh Python inline section:

1. Add import for config reading near top of Python section:
   import subprocess
   def _read_config(key):
       try:
           result = subprocess.run([...read-config.sh, key], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
           return result.stdout.strip()
       except Exception:
           return ""
   _FLAG_ENABLED = _read_config("planning.external_dependency_block_enabled").lower() in ("true", "1", "yes")

2. Rename _DESIGN_AWAITING_IMPORT_TAG to keep it, and add:
   _MANUAL_AWAITING_USER_TAG = "manual:awaiting_user"

3. Generalize is_parent_story_design_awaiting() to is_parent_story_awaiting(task_id, tag):
   - Same lookup logic as existing function but parameterized on tag name
   - Keep backward-compatible: is_parent_story_design_awaiting(task_id) calls is_parent_story_awaiting(task_id, _DESIGN_AWAITING_IMPORT_TAG)

4. In the per-task filter loop, add after design:awaiting_import check:
   if _FLAG_ENABLED:
       manual_awaiting_parent = is_parent_story_awaiting(tid, _MANUAL_AWAITING_USER_TAG)
       if manual_awaiting_parent:
           skipped_manual_awaiting.append((tid, title, manual_awaiting_parent))
           continue

5. Add skipped_manual_awaiting list (initialized to []) and add to output:
   for tid, title, sid in skipped_manual_awaiting:
       print(f"SKIPPED_MANUAL_AWAITING: {tid}\t{title}\tstory:{sid}")

6. source planning-tags.conf at shell level near top of script:
   source "${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/shared/constants/planning-tags.conf"

The design:awaiting_import filter MUST continue to work regardless of _FLAG_ENABLED (it is not flag-gated).
The manual:awaiting_user filter is ONLY applied when _FLAG_ENABLED=true.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story passes GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_includes_manual_story_when_flag_off passes GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh test_sprint_next_batch_includes_manual_story_when_flag_off 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_generalized_predicate_catches_design_awaiting_import passes GREEN (regression)
  Verify: bash tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh test_sprint_next_batch_generalized_predicate_catches_design_awaiting_import 2>&1; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] sprint-next-batch.sh sources planning-tags.conf via _PLUGIN_ROOT (no hardcoded path)
  Verify: grep -q "_PLUGIN_ROOT.*planning-tags.conf" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] SKIPPED_MANUAL_AWAITING output lines appear in stdout when flag enabled
  Verify: grep -q "SKIPPED_MANUAL_AWAITING" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh
